name: Avocadini Antilopini
lore:
Lore of Avocadini Antilopini
                                    


Description
Avocadini Antilopini is another surreal gem in the Italian Brainrot universe. This video showcases six antelope-fruit hybrids. The figure combines two completely unrelated things – an avocado and an antelope – and the result is exactly as crazy as you’d imagine. If you want to delve further into vegetable-based mayhem, you can also check out Bobrini Zucchini or Bananita Dolfinita.
Lyrics
Avocadini Antilopini! Antilop-lop-lop luchi, avocaduchi! Or... Fragolucci Antelopucci! Fragolopo antilopo, fragolopo antilopipi! Or... Antelopo Cachipopo! Cachini antilopini, yep yep yep! Cacalipi Antilopipi! Or... Guavinelo Antilopinelo! Guavalop-lop-lop, guavinuchi antelonuchi! Or... Lichiloliluchi Antilopiluchi! Badaboom-badabang, antilopineli lichilocineli! Or... Peachonelo Antilopinelo! Shloorp, nyam nyam! Antilopiluchi peachiomiuchi!
